sentence.chinese: 維持社會秩序有兩個重要的力量，一個是道德良知；一個是法律規範。
sentence.ab: Ira ko tosaay a tadakalimelaan a tada’icel to sapikedec to niyaro’, o sakacecay i, o midoedoay to moecelay ko faloco’; o sakatosa i, iraen ko sakirikec a likakawa sapitefoc to ciraraway.

sentence.chinese: 傳統的阿美族部落，雖然沒有法律文字條文及法官、法庭，但部落頭目、長老、年齡階級的級長，組成的審判團，具有裁判的效力。茲列舉如下:
sentence.ab: Ano awaawa ko tilid to sakirikec no niyaro’ ato miliclicay, pisawkitan, kawrira i, ira ko kakitaan, malitengay ato kafafaw no kasakapot, masacefangay a mamisawkit, ira to ko nano liteng ho a mipatirengan a rikec, tinakosa ilaeno.

sentence.chinese: 一、殺人、縱火罪：毫無悔意者，引至深山狩獵後，出其不意將射殺，有悔意者，將所屬房屋拆毀。
sentence.ab: Sakacecay. Mipatayay ato mi’ilohay. Ano awa ko masomaday a faloco’, patalalotoken a mi’adop nga’ lipalaw han a mipatay. Ano masomad ko faloco’ tastasen ko loma’.

sentence.chinese: 二、傷害、毆打罪：罰割讓農地及一隻豬、數隻雞賠償給被害人，無力賠償者，將所屬房屋拆毀。
sentence.ab: Sakatosa. O midoka’ay, misekongay a raraw. Litefocen to omah ato cecay a diyong, ato pinapina a koko’ anca tastasen ko loma’ ningra.

sentence.chinese: 三、搶奪、竊盜罪：需歸還搶奪及竊盜的物品給原主，並鞭打教訓，賠償一隻豬、數隻雞，無力賠償者，將所屬房屋拆毀。
sentence.ab: Sakatolo. O micefisay ato mitakaway. Papipatikolen toya micefisan ato mitakawan, sapedecen to sakacenon. Patefoc to cecay a diyong ato pinapina a koko’, ano awa ko sapatikol i, tastasen ko loma’ ningra.

sentence.chinese: 四、侵占、詐欺罪：需歸還原物品外，罰則一隻豬、數隻雞，否則給予處死及將所屬房屋拆毀。
sentence.ab: Sakasepat. O mi’ecoay ato misafana’ay a raraw. Patikolen ko nisafana’an a maamaan, litefocen to diyong ato pinapina a koko’, anca patayen ato tastasen ko loma’ ningra.

sentence.chinese: 五、強姦、通姦罪：以豬、牛、酒當作遮羞費或於大眾面前赤身露體。
sentence.ab: Sakalima. Ano ma’odangay milemoay a raraw. Patefoc to kolong, diyong, epah, anca pakakawangen ika’ayaw no filawlan a pakangodo.

sentence.chinese: 六、年齡階級：皆有內規，其互相制約並自律。
sentence.ab: Sakaenem. O masakapotay no niyaro’, ira ko sarikec no masakapotay, matatapal ko kasakapot to waywayan halo pirikec to sakinanot no niyah.

sentence.chinese: 在日本時代，我們遵循日本法律。民國時代，也遵循中華民國法律。在2005年2月5日我們已有原住民族基本法。
sentence.ab: IkaDipongan doedosa to rikec no Dipong. IkaMingkokan i, midoedo to rikec no kanatal. Isakatosa a patek ira ko lima a mihecaan no sakatosa a folad no sakalima a romi’ad, irato ko tatapangan a rikec no Yincominco a finacadan.
